---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working right
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A quick description of the issue.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Went to [URL]
2. [What you did — pasted the script, clicked the extension, etc.]
3. [What happened]

**What did you expect?**
What you thought would happen instead.

**Screenshots or screen recording**
If you can, drop a screenshot or a quick recording here. Drag and drop works.

**Environment**
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 124, Arc, Safari 18)
- OS: (e.g. macOS, Windows 11)
- Using: (script in console / Chrome extension)

**Console errors (if any)**
Open DevTools → Console tab → paste any red error messages here.
